Magic Well Explorer Chest
Cult Notes Scepter

The unit's spell power is increased by 35% for each petrified enemy for the duration of the battle.

Once in a while, turns 3 enemies to stone for 3 sec. During this time, they can't move and take 35% more damage. Also, the scepter wielder deals 200000 (+bonus of the spell power) magic damage to the targets of the ability.

Requirements: 98-100
